description: The Licenses class describes the set of all installed license objects. It can be accessed with the licenses object, , found in the automatically imported td module.

members.name: disablePro
members.description: When True, the application will run as though no Pro licenses are available. This can be used to test compatibility with lesser licenses. (See also: app.addNonCommercialLimit)

members.name: dongles
members.description: Get the list of dongles connected to the system.

members.name: isPro
members.description: When True, the application is running with a Pro license. It is recommended to use this and isNonCommerical over the type method.

members.name: isNonCommercial
members.description: When True, the application is running with a Non-Commercial license. It is recommended to use this and isPro over the type method.

members.name: type
members.description: The highest ranking license type of all installed licenses, some products being 'Pro', 'Non-Commercial', 'Commercial'. See also app.product in App Class.

methods.name: install
methods.description: Install a license with the specified key. Returns True if successful.

_provenance.fact: scraped from the Licenses Class wiki page
